evidence_own.quote: On DomainQA, RadarNet improves exact match from 61.2% to 68.7% over BM25 under unseen-domain evaluation.

evidence_new.quote: On the DomainQA unseen-domain split, EchoRAG reaches 70.1 exact match while our RadarNet reproduction reaches 64.0 using the same BM25 baseline.

evidence_own.quote: RadarNet maintains 66.4% exact match when 20% of evidence passages contain retrieval noise.

evidence_new.quote: With 20% retrieval noise on DomainQA, RadarNet retains 65.9% exact match across five seeds.

evidence_own.quote: The hierarchical evidence router reduces median retrieval latency by 31% compared with a flat dense index.

evidence_new.quote: LayerRoute reduces median retrieval latency by 34% relative to a flat dense index on DomainQA.

uncertainty: Independent implementation; scientific stance is not inferred from competitor status.

evidence_own.quote: Our calibrated abstention rule lowers unsupported-answer rate from 14.8% to 6.1% on ShiftBench.

evidence_new.quote: On the ShiftBench test split, RadarNet's calibrated abstention produces a 12.9% unsupported-answer rate, while the matched no-abstention system produces 14.7%.

evidence_own.quote: Training with source-diverse batches improves Macro-F1 by 4.2 points across three low-resource domains.

evidence_new.quote: Source-diverse batches improve Macro-F1 for news but show no improvement for the biomedical domain; the evaluation split is not reported.

evidence_own.quote: Ablation results show that removing claim-aware reranking decreases exact match by 5.6 points.

evidence_new.quote: Removing claim-aware reranking from RadarNet reduces DomainQA exact match by 5.2 points in our independent implementation.

evidence_own.quote: Our evaluation protocol follows the CleanEval benchmark and uses its released relevance judgments.

evidence_new.quote: The CleanEval relevance judgments are retracted after leakage between annotation and evaluation sets was confirmed.

uncertainty: The downstream magnitude of the integrity issue has not yet been measured.
